name: Data Extraction
description: Structured data from unstructured sources like PDFs, Excel files, and images

content.title: Intelligent Data Extraction
content.content:
# Intelligent Data Extraction

AI transforms unstructured documents into structured, actionable data that flows directly into operational systems.

## The Challenge

Valuable data is trapped in unstructured formats:
- **PDFs**: Contracts, reports, statements
- **Excel files**: Submissions with varying layouts
- **Images**: Scanned documents, photographs
- **Emails**: Key information buried in prose

Manual data entry is slow, expensive, and error-prone.

## AI-Powered Solution

```mermaid
graph TD
    subgraph "Unstructured Sources"
        A[PDF Contract]
        B[Excel Submission]
        C[Scanned Image]
    end

    subgraph "AI Extraction"
        D[Document AI]
        E[Table Recognition]
        F[OCR + Vision]
    end

    subgraph "Structured Output"
        G[JSON Data]
        H[Database Records]
        I[API Payload]
    end

    A --> D --> G
    B --> E --> H
    C --> F --> I
```

## Extraction Capabilities

| Source Type | AI Approach | Output |
|-------------|-------------|--------|
| **Native PDF** | Text extraction with layout analysis | Structured fields |
| **Scanned PDF** | OCR + document intelligence | Key-value pairs |
| **Excel** | Table detection, header recognition | Normalized records |
| **Images** | Vision AI + OCR | Text and visual descriptions |
| **Email** | NLP entity extraction | Structured metadata |

## Validation & Enrichment

Extracted data is automatically validated:

```mermaid
graph LR
    A[Extracted Data] --> B{Valid Format?}
    B -->|No| C[Flag for Review]
    B -->|Yes| D{Matches Master Data?}
    D -->|No| C
    D -->|Yes| E[Enrich with Context]
    E --> F[Write to System]
```

## Benefits

- **Automation**: Eliminate manual data entry
- **Accuracy**: Consistent extraction with validation
- **Speed**: Process documents in seconds
- **Integration**: Data flows directly to operational systems
